name: zwo
pin_target: ZWO ASCOM 6.5.20 and ASIStudio 1.14.0.0 on mastw - acquire older installers to downgrade. See compare-mastw/GAPS.md.
description: Install ZWO camera drivers, ASI Studio, and ASCOM driver.
verify: powershell.exe -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -NoProfile -NonInteractive -Command "$log = Join-Path (Join-Path $env:SystemDrive 'MAST') 'logs\verify\zwo-verify.log'; $smoke = Join-Path (Join-Path $env:SystemDrive 'MAST') 'logs\smoke\zwo-smoke.txt'; $a1 = 'C:\Program Files\ASIStudio\ASIStudio.exe'; $a2 = 'C:\Program Files (x86)\ASIStudio\ASIStudio.exe'; $studio = ((Test-Path -LiteralPath $a1) -or (Test-Path -LiteralPath $a2)); $drv = ((& pnputil.exe /enum-drivers 2>&1) | Select-String 'asicamusb3.inf' -Quiet); if ($studio -and $drv) { Set-Content -Path $log -Value 'ZWO ASI Studio + ASICAMUSB3 camera driver installed'; Set-Content -Path $smoke -Value 'zwo_ok' } else { $msg = @(); if (-not $studio) { $msg += 'ASIStudio.exe not found under Program Files' }; if (-not $drv) { $msg += 'asicamusb3.inf not present in driver store (pnputil /enum-drivers)' }; ($msg -join '; ') | Out-File -FilePath $log -Encoding UTF8; exit 1 }"
